description: Verify all scaffolded files exist and have meaningful content

checks.name: file-existence
checks.label: File Existence Check
checks.description: Verify all declared files exist on disk
checks.pass: all declared files exist on filesystem

checks.name: file-non-empty
checks.label: File Non-Empty Check
checks.description: Verify all files have meaningful content (> 50 bytes)
checks.pass: all declared files > 50 bytes OR are known config types

failure.userMessage: Scaffolded files are missing or empty. The step did not produce expected output files.
